microtop.title: KORODUR Micro-Top
microtop.subtitle: Mineral Drinking Water Tank Renovation
microtop.description: Purely mineral coating system according to DVGW W 300 – for drinking water tanks, elevated reservoirs and water towers. No polymer additives, DVGW-certified, microsilica-enhanced.

produktmatrix.title: Renovation Product Portfolio
produktmatrix.legende_stufe5: Highest load (hard aggregate DIN 1100 A · traffic surface standard)
produktmatrix.legende_stufe4: Very high load (hard aggregate level, concrete C45+)
produktmatrix.legende_schichtdicke: Recommended renovation application range per layer. Values from current technical data sheets.
produktmatrix.legende_belastbar_nach: Fully load-bearing or traffic release after installation. For hard aggregate screeds typically 3 days per DIN 18560-7.
produktmatrix.cta_text: Not sure? The solution finder guides you in a few steps to the right solution – or talk directly to our advisors.
